getStarted.title: Get started with AI agents in VS Code
getStarted.description: Use AI agents to plan, write code, run tests, and fix bugs — all from a single chat session. Agents handle multi-step tasks so you can focus on what matters.

latest.title: Build a feature end-to-end with agents
latest.description: Walk through a complete agent session: describe a feature, let the agent plan, write code, and run tests.

latest.title: AI core concepts
latest.description: Get an overview of the core concepts and how AI agents work in VS Code.

latest.title: Customize AI for your team
latest.description: Configure custom instructions, prompt files, and MCP servers to tailor AI to your workflow.
